title: Examining Genetic Variants Associated with FOXP1 Syndrome through Molecular Dynamics of Its DNA-Binding Domain and Self-Organizing Maps.
abstract: MD simulations of six missense FOXP1 variants, molecular docking, and self-organizing maps. Variants in helix H3 of DNA-binding domain show reduced DNA interactions. Co-authored with De Rubeis/Buxbaum lab (Seaver Autism Center).
